titleStmt.title: SII 17.707: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 707. (A.R. No. 650 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

This inscription seems to record a gift of money, the purpose of which is not clear. Mentions Villavarāyaṉ, a vēḷāṉ of Niṉṟaiyūr-nāḍu, Vikramaśōḻa-villavarāyan and his wife Piḻaiyilāvāchakar Veñjolañji Paḻiyañji of Paḻaiyanūr.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattāṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu ninṟaiyūr nāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tiruk kārikaraip
piḷḷaiyāṟkuk kuḷattuḻāṉ niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu veḷān navikkan cun=taranāṉa villavarāyan tiru(k)kkāḷatti Uṭaiyān peṟṟānāṉa Appañci vikkiramacoḻa villavarāyaṉ Akamuṭai yāḷ paḻaiyā
nūṟ piḻaiyilāvācakar veñcolañci paḻiyañci kacci kaṭampaṉ taḻuvakkuḻaiñ cāṉ Uyyavantāṉāna kulottuṅkacoḻac civapāta �In these places some blank space is left due to the inadvertance; the engraver or for later engraving. piriyaṉ viḻup paraiyaṉ caṭṭi Oṉpatu māṟi
poṉ patinmukkaḻaIn these places some blank space is left due to the inadvertance; the engraver or for later engraving. raṇṭu .
Digital edition of SII 17.707 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
